title: WS1 coordinated handoff complete
body: Floating Lifting Thermal coordinated the WS1 token-measurement session handoff under claim c98b9955. Canonical surfaces updated: agentic-engineering thread record, repo-continuity, controlling plan, and napkin. Captured positives: coherent modular practice-fitness implementation, content-only chars/4 token rows, repeated green validation. Captured issues/blockers: duplicate WS1 claims, source ownership collision, Salty's .active_claims vs .claims grounding miss during stale-comms cleanup, transient peer-staged rename/index caution, dirty working tree with WS1 source plus shared collaboration-state residue. Next safe step: re-check live claims/queue/index and commit the exact WS1 bundle before WS2. No git/index work performed in this handoff.
